content.text:
[cron:bae185f4-1bf6-4754-988d-9cf37a0b8817 maiy-publish-noon] Run the MAIY Tech Hub noon publishing cron.

Execute: curl -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/cron/publish -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'authorization: Bearer $CRON_SECRET' -d '{"slot":"noon"}'

Use exec tool to run the curl command above.

After running, log the result to /root/.openclaw/workspaces2/v4-ecosystem-review/maiy-tech-hub/logs/publish-cron.log

If the server returns success, the noon article has been auto-published.
Current time: Friday, April 24th, 2026 - 10:00 PM (UTC) / 2026-04-24 22:00 UTC

Use the message tool if you need to notify the user directly for the current chat. If you do not send directly, your final plain-text reply will be delivered automatically.

data.error: aborted | cron: job execution timed out
